statement: Weekly calendar view layout — In the Builder's weekly Timeline view, the stage fits exactly 5 expanded weekday cards (Mon–Fri) + 2 collapsed weekend day cards (Sat, Sun) within the visible stage, with NO horizontal scroll across the desktop viewport range (per REQ-RESP-001, 14in→85in). Weekdays render expanded; weekend days render collapsed/compact. Day cards follow the unified ~80%-height/10%-margin model (CC-2). Replaces phase columns in this view per REQ-STG-001.
